prompt: Ultra-detailed wide street art mural painted on a rough concrete city wall with a split composition. On the left side, a vibrant tropical beach scene in warm pastel tones shows a young woman (same face as reference) relaxing on a chair, sipping a coconut under a sunset sky, with playful tropical emojis and the caption “healing.” On the right side, a dark and messy workspace in cold bluish-gray tones shows the same woman stressed at a desk surrounded by scattered papers, a coffee mug, and a glowing laptop displaying “DEADLINE 23:59”. In the center, bold graffiti text reads “ORANG LAIN HEALING” and “GUE DEADLINE” in a dripping paint style with high contrast colors. Include a “MEEM” tag with a stylized dragon logo beneath. Cinematic lighting, gritty textures, hyper-realistic style, strong emotional contrast, 8K detail.
